purpose: Remedy arm for the core 150-episode benchmark: ZOCBF-style dead-time-robust CBF margin on the static prediction profile. The constraint radius grows as speed_bound * (time since last measurement + stage offset), covering any bounded obstacle motion between the 0.67 s sensor updates.
references: arXiv:2411.17079 (zero-order CBF: robustness terms guarantee safety between sampling instants)
notes: speed_bound 0.21 m/s dominates every scenario family's obstacle speed magnitude (max ~0.203 m/s across CS1-CS3).
Planning-side inflation only; true-clearance metrics keep the raw combined radius, and the frozen baseline profile is untouched (dead_time_margin_mode defaults to off).
Worst-case inflation at stage 15 just before a sensor update is ~0.21 * (0.67 + 0.60) = 0.267 m - feasibility stress is an expected, honestly reported outcome.
Gaussian measurement noise remains unbounded, so no formal bounded-error safety claim follows from this profile.
